use_cases: Landing page hero sections showcasing product features with illustrated visuals
Feature description sections with text and supporting imagery side-by-side
Marketing content blocks with highlighted text and decorative illustrations
Product or service showcase pages with animated icon accents
About and value proposition sections combining prose with visual elements
ai_summary: A responsive hero section component that displays text content alongside a full-width illustration, featuring a distinctive hand-drawn circle highlight effect on the title and support for animated decorative icons. The two-column grid layout adapts from stacked mobile view to side-by-side desktop arrangement, making it ideal for landing pages, feature showcases, and marketing content sections where visual storytelling enhances the written message.
